---
title: "The Rev. Charles Wickham"
---

## The Rev. Charles Wickham

**Dates:** (b.1824/5)

### Description

Rector of Compton

### Biography

He was Rector of Compton from 1871; he was the third son of James Wickham, of Wonston, Hants.. [PO Hants 1875]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
